title: SUNNYCLUE 80PCS 10 Styles Unicorn Rainbow Theme Resin Flatback Cabochons Slime Beads Charms for DIY Phone Decor Scrapbooks Embellishments Hair Costume Accessories Ornaments
features: ❤[80PCS RESIN FLATBACK CABOCHON]: Come with 80pcs unicorn rainbow theme resin flatback cabochons. 10 styles, 8pcs/style.
❤[MATERIAL]: The cabochon slime charms are made of resin, durable, safe and lightweight material, not easy to break or fade, you can keep them for quite a long time.
❤[WELL ATTACHED]: These are flat back cabochons, it can be placed smoothly and it is easy for you to stick it tightly on your diy crafts. It is garnished with glitter powder, beautiful and delicate.
❤[SIZE]: About 19-32mm long, 13-36mm wide, 5-8mm thick. Color: Mixed Color.

❤[WIDE USE]: Adding these sweet slime beads for DIY craft projects decoration, ornaments, phone case, nail, camera, scrap booking, mirrors, jewelry, bracelets, hair accessories, necklaces, hairpins, clothing, shoes, hats, handbags, belts, wallets, home decor.
